name: wtc_nft_minter
description: NFT staking ecosystem using Hardhat 3 on Sepolia

scripts.verify:nft: hardhat build --build-profile production && hardhat verify --network sepolia 0xE73A1CA4e89b1afFE6a96d7d5b6D6F8c1669b12D 10000000000000000
scripts.verify:coin: hardhat build --build-profile production && hardhat verify --network sepolia 0xfd3e678d9dAE2762B0205254E60723f845b024cA
scripts.verify:vault: hardhat build --build-profile production && hardhat verify --network sepolia 0x5a746227730c729c9Fcc26Ccd0fB0a111E1D5bB5 0xE73A1CA4e89b1afFE6a96d7d5b6D6F8c1669b12D 0xfd3e678d9dAE2762B0205254E60723f845b024cA
